untranslatable_reason: Dead-cat bounce requires multi-bar pattern recognition: (1) identify sharp prior decline (20-36% over multiple days), (2) detect bounce upward within ~1 week, (3) confirm resumption of downtrend. This requires historical sequence analysis and forward-looking confirmation that exceed single-bar indicator logic. The pattern necessitates lookback into prior bars' cumulative decline and forward confirmation of trend resumption, which cannot be expressed as simple indicator crossovers without custom multi-bar state tracking.
